employee_eligibility_conditions.notes: Applies only to salaried employees seeking paid parental leave; rehired retirees receiving annuity payments during first 1,040 hours of the calendar year are not eligible.
employee_eligibility_conditions.source_text: if salaried, the employee must have six continuous months of employment with an employing entity (as defined in O.C.G.A. 45-20-17(a)(2)(A))

employee_eligibility_conditions.notes: Applies only to hourly employees seeking paid parental leave; the 700 hours must be worked in the six months immediately preceding the first requested paid parental leave date.
employee_eligibility_conditions.source_text: if hourly, the employee must have worked 700 hours for an employing entity (as defined in O.C.G.A. 45-20-17(a)(2)(A)) in the six months immediately preceding the first requested paid parental leave date.
